title: Smoky Cozy Chicken Stir Fry
description: A hearty, comforting chicken stir fry with a smoky twist. Quick to make and perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: cozy oil
ingredients.notes: such as olive or avocado oil

instructions: 1. Heat the cozy oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
3. Add more cozy oil to the skillet if necessary, then add the smoky pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the juicy garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
5. Pour in the stir-fry sauce and bring to a simmer.
6. Return the cooked chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
7. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the chicken is coated.
8. Serve hot over rice or noodles, garnished with sliced smoky pepper if desired.
